title: New Slab, Stairs and Walls
description: Adds a lot of block varieties of existing vanilla blocks
body:
This mod Adds a lot of slabs, stairs and walls of existing blocks, using its parent's minecraft texture so any texture pack will update the look of the blocks added by this mod. Some of the bocks added are: sculk (slab, stairs, wall, fence, fence gate), all concrete/terracota/wool colors (slab, stairs, wall), even obsidian and ice varieties. Some images:
